Title: Test Configuration with valid data
Test Steps:
1. Create a new Configuration object
2. Set the attributes with the provided test data
3. Call the start() operation
Expected Result: The Configuration object is created successfully with the provided data

Title: Test NotificationSystem with valid data
Test Data: id=1, postDate="2023-03-01", title="Test Notification", priority=1, category="Test", address="Test Address", creator="Test User"
Test Steps:
1. Create a new NotificationSystem object
2. Set the attributes with the provided test data
3. Call the start() operation
Expected Result: The NotificationSystem object is created successfully with the provided data

Title: Test downloadReports() operation with valid data
Preconditions: NotificationSystem object is created with valid data
Test Steps:
1. Create a new NotificationSystem object with valid data
2. Call the downloadReports() operation
Expected Result: The operation returns true, indicating successful download of reports

Title: Test downloadReports() operation with no reports
Preconditions: NotificationSystem object is created with no reports
Test Steps:
1. Create a new NotificationSystem object with no reports
2. Call the downloadReports() operation
Expected Result: The operation returns false, indicating no reports to download

Title: Test elaborateData() operation with valid data
Preconditions: NotificationSystem object is created with valid data
Test Data: List of Reports with valid data
Test Steps:
1. Create a new NotificationSystem object with valid data
2. Call the elaborateData() operation with a list of valid reports
Expected Result: The operation processes the reports successfully

Title: Test elaborateData() operation with invalid data (Report with invalid data)
Preconditions: NotificationSystem object is created with valid data
Test Data: List of Reports with one invalid report
Test Steps:
1. Create a new NotificationSystem object with valid data
2. Call the elaborateData() operation with a list containing one invalid report
Expected Result: The operation fails to process the invalid report

Title: Test sendNotificationReport() operation with valid data
Preconditions: NotificationSystem object is created with valid data and a valid Report object
Test Steps:
1. Create a new NotificationSystem object with valid data
2. Create a new Report object with valid data
3. Call the sendNotificationReport() operation with the valid Report object
Expected Result: The operation sends the notification successfully

Title: Test sendNotificationReport() operation with invalid data (Report with invalid data)
Preconditions: NotificationSystem object is created with valid data and a Report with invalid data
Test Steps:
1. Create a new NotificationSystem object with valid data
2. Create a new Report object with invalid data
3. Call the sendNotificationReport() operation with the invalid Report object
Expected Result: The operation fails to send the notification due to the invalid Report data

Title: Test showNotificationWithDefaultSound() operation with valid data
Preconditions: NotificationSystem object is created with valid data
Test Steps:
1. Create a new NotificationSystem object with valid data
2. Call the showNotificationWithDefaultSound() operation with valid data
Expected Result: The notification is displayed with the default sound

Title: Test showNotificationWithDefaultSound() operation with invalid data (withSound=false)
Preconditions: NotificationSystem object is created with valid data
Test Steps:
1. Create a new NotificationSystem object with valid data
2. Call the showNotificationWithDefaultSound() operation with invalid data
Expected Result: The notification is displayed without sound
